paperTitle: HiMoE-VLA:​ Hierarchical​ Mixture-of-Experts for Generalist Vision-Language-Action Policies
organization: Fudan University / Microsoft Research Asia / XJTU / Tsinghua University

benchmarks.label: CALVIN
benchmarks.detail: Tasks: chain 1 0.932 · chain 2 0.855 · chain 3 0.789 · chain 4 0.731 · chain 5 0.66 · avg len 3.967 | Table 1 | Notes: Protocol does not match ABC→D standard | Uses D→D split, not the standard ABC→D. Paper states 'We adopt the challenging D→D setting'.

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 98.2 · libero object 99.4 · libero goal 98.6 · libero 10 94.8 | Table 2 | Notes: Reports all 4 standard suites. 50 demos per task. Average = (98.2+99.4+98.6+94.8)/4 = 97.75 ≈ 97.8.
